reviewed_validation_summary: `python3 tools/validate_runtime_boundary_contract.py`; `python3 tools/lode_validate_package.py --registry-index registry/local-packages.json --all --json`; `PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 -m py_compile tools/lode_validate_package.py tools/validate_runtime_boundary_contract.py`; `git diff --check`; `loom fact-chain --target . --json`; `loom verify --target . --json`; `loom suite validate --target . --item LODE-253 --json`; `loom suite evidence validate --target . --item LODE-253 --json`; `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item LODE-253 --json` passed locally.
follow_ups: Full live runtime validation remains blocked until Core and Harbor own a user-authorized browser session and evidence refs.
summary: Spec review accepts the Lode-not-runtime-runner boundary and Core registry consumption contract for LODE-253.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The spec is constrained to Lode capability assets, local registry/query facts, closeout wording, refs-only evidence requirements, and no-submit write-precheck guardrails; runtime execution, hosted registry, real accounts, and production page actions remain out of scope.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: The spec supports Core consumption without moving browser provider/profile/session, live evidence, or write execution truth into Lode.
